title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Page One, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Sasaki! If you keep on screwing around like that, I'll tear you apart!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you two brats both be quiet for two minutes?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uli-chan doesn't back down from anyone, I like that()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do we have to wait like this after being called for?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's very urgent! Finally an important demand from KAIDO...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although the result from this is plain to see.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They aren't in a position to leave now!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 15 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
